summary: Footage of Trump delivering remarks from a lectern bearing the presidential seal on the South Lawn of the White House, framed by the building's curved portico. A woman in a white dress and wide-brimmed hat stands at left and a grey-suited man stands at right among seated guests. The audio is the speech. The tweet text quotes remarks about America and the cause of freedom at a 250th-anniversary celebration.

script.scene: Trump speaks from a lectern with the presidential seal on the White House South Lawn; a woman in white at left and a grey-suited man at right.
